case_title: STEVEN HILL VS. STEPHANIE MARY NG

DECLARATION RE: DEFENDANT'S CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY DEFENDANT NG, STEPHANIE MARY

STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER FILED BY HILL, STEVEN NG, STEPHANIE MARY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HILL, STEVEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NG, STEPHANIE MARY $3,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,200.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY HILL, STEVEN AS TO DEFENDANT NG, STEPHANIE MARY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-25-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-14-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-14-2022 BY JUDGE PRO TEM WILLIAM LYNN. PLAINTIFF STEVEN HILL IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT STEPHANIE MARY NG IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
(SC-220)REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT NG, STEPHANIE MARY

REMARK: RETURN MAIL RECD. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO STEVEN HILL-NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED
